states.bulk_method: Single ArcGIS REST FeatureService. Paginate the /1/query (Land Bank Plots) layer with resultOffset (1000 records/response; 'Pagination not supported' on some layers so page via OBJECTID>N ranges or omit resultRecordCount). Layer /0 = Land Bank Cluster, /1 = Land Bank Plots, /3 = IDCO ESTATES, /4 = Ind.Park/Inv.Region. Also test/Industry_Info MapServer holds allotted-industry parcels. Fields: OBJECTID, PLOT_NO, DIST, TAHA, KHATA_NO, KISAM, AREA_AC, CATEGORY, CLUSTER_NA + geometry.
states.notes: The single true structured geospatial API in the survey. gis.investodisha.org is an Esri JS viewer; its backend is the open ArcGIS Server at gis.investodisha.gov.in/arcgis/rest/services (folders System/test/testing). GOPLUS/landbank.aspx wraps the same data. No token, no login.

states.endpoint: GET https://eservices.onlineupsida.com/PropertyHub/Index.aspx (server-rendered DataTable of all available plots)
states.bulk_method: Single GET returns the whole available-plot list as an HTML DataTable; parse all <tr> rows. Columns: District, Industrial Area Name, Estimate Price/sqm, Plot Number, Available Plot Size (sqm), Total Estimated Cost, plus per-row GIS (onemapup.nic.in/upsida/map.aspx) and Nivesh Mitra links. One request; optionally filter by district/sector via the form.
states.notes: The named domain upsida.co.in blocks scripted curl (TLS/000) but the e-services host onlineupsida.com serves the real, richest machine-readable table (price + plot no + size per parcel). GIS overlay via NIC OneMap (onemapup.nic.in).

states.bulk_method: Per-zone-then-per-park iteration. Level 1: VacantPlots.jsp?param=vacz&usrzn=ALL lists 14 zones (ANAKAPALLI, CHITTOOR, ELURU, GUNTUR, KADAPA, KAKINADA, KURNOOL, PRAKASAM, PUTTAPARTHY, SRIKAKULAM, TIRUPATI, TIRUPATI SPL PROJECTS, VIJAYAWADA, VISAKHAPATNAM). Level 2: param=vacz1&zn=<ZONE> lists parks with plot counts/area/rate. Level 3: param=vacz2&zn=<ZONE>&pname1=<PARK> gives plot-level rows: Plot/Shed No, Structure Type, Area(Sqm/Acre), Updation Date, Status, Category, Sector, Plot Type, Remarks. All server-rendered HTML tables.
states.notes: Fully public plot-level vacancy on a Bloom Solutions KPI app (self-signed cert on :8443 - use -k). gisviewer.apiic.in is a Leaflet-WMS map (utility/infra layers) but the parcel data is the JSP. IndustrialProp_prop.jsp variant currently 500s; VacantPlots.jsp works.

states.corporation: TGIIC (formerly TSIIC) - Telangana State Industrial Infrastructure Corporation
states.bulk_method: Server-rendered HTML tables per view: PMVacantPlots (zone-wise), PMVacantPlots/DistWisePMVacantData (district-wise), EOTTDSReports/categoryWiseReport (category-wise), PMVacantPlots/TSFPZZonewiseIPs (food-park zones). These are aggregate counts/area; individual plot rows drill via POST from the dashboard. GIS map: tgrac.telangana.gov.in/tgiic/tsiic/default.aspx.
states.notes: tsiic.telangana.gov.in now meta-refreshes to tgiic.telangana.gov.in (Telangana rebrand TSIIC->TGIIC). Public no-login summaries; true parcel-level detail needs the interactive dashboard/GIS (Selenium).

states.corporation: RIICO (Rajasthan State Industrial Development & Investment Corporation)
states.bulk_method: Single GET of undevelopedland.aspx returns the full undeveloped-land table (Sr No, Village/Area Name, Tehsil, District) - parse <tr>. Hindi twin at UndevelopedLandBankHindi.aspx. Note: this lists undeveloped/raw land only (no area/price). Developed plot availability & e-auction is on the RIICO e-services (riico.rajasthan.gov.in) and is largely form/login-driven.
states.notes: riico.co.in mirrors riico.rajasthan.gov.in; the co.in copy of the page renders rows client-side (0 <tr> to curl) so use the rajasthan.gov.in host. Undeveloped land bank is public HTML; allottable developed plots are gated behind e-services.

states.portal_url: https://land.midcindia.org/Landbank/index (Online Land Allotment System) + https://services.midcindia.org/services/vacantplotsdetails.aspx (MILAAP vacant plots)
states.endpoint: POST https://land.midcindia.org/Landbank/<GetLandBank...> (ASP.NET MVC AJAX controller; POST paths return 411 Length-Required without a body, i.e. exist but need the form payload)
states.bulk_method: Reverse-engineer the MVC AJAX controller behind land.midcindia.org/Landbank/index (frontendver2.1.3.js drives a DataTable that POSTs JSON of available plots), or drive it with Selenium/Playwright and read the XHR JSON. The public MILAAP vacant-plots list at services.midcindia.org/services/vacantplotsdetails.aspx is also JS/AJAX-populated. No login required to browse either.
states.notes: Land bank is public (no login) but 100% JS/AJAX - the parcel data never appears in the initial HTML, so it is machine-readable only via the backend JSON call or a headless browser. Could not capture a sample without executing the page's JS (browser navigation to these domains was policy-blocked in this session).

states.corporation: HSIIDC (Haryana State Industrial & Infrastructure Development Corporation)
states.bulk_method: GET the land-availability page for the 66-row estate reserve-price HTML table (parse <tr>). Actual plot-level availability is a downloadable PDF (Availability01072022.pdf - dated 2022, stale). GIS viewer hsiidcgis.org.in is Google-Maps-based on a Yii2 backend (/hsiidcgis/backend/web/index.php, /api/js live) - an undocumented internal API may exist but was not confirmed open.
states.notes: Machine-readable at estate/rate granularity only; parcel availability is a stale 2022 PDF. GIS backend is a candidate for a JSON API but needs deeper probing.

states.bulk_method: None public. Plot allocation runs through the eGov portal egov.gidcgujarat.org which requires party registration/login (Accounts/PartyRegistration.aspx). The main gidc.gujarat.gov.in site is informational (estate directory + a Google-Maps embed of HQ); no open plot list, WFS, or REST service found.
states.notes: GIDC exposes no public machine-readable parcel/vacant-plot endpoint; availability and allotment are behind the eGov login. Guessed /geoserver and /arcgis paths 404.

states.portal_url: https://kiadb.karnataka.gov.in/ (kiadb.in is a stub that redirects here)
states.bulk_method: None public. kiadb.karnataka.gov.in is a JS-rendered informational site; allotment-of-industrial-plot pages return near-empty stubs to curl. No public plot list, CSV, WFS or ArcGIS service found; land allotment is application/login-driven.
states.notes: kiadb.in is a thin redirect stub to the real gov domain. No open machine-readable parcel data located; would need Selenium to confirm any in-app list, but nothing indicates a public availability feed.

states.corporation: SIPCOT (State Industries Promotion Corporation of Tamil Nadu) + TIDCO
states.bulk_method: None openly queryable. The real portal is sipcotweb.tn.gov.in (live). Its GIS at sipcotgis.tn.gov.in is GeoServer-backed (mainpage.aspx references geoserver/wfs and geoserver/cite/wms) but the /geoserver/wfs?request=GetCapabilities path returns IIS 404 - the WMS/WFS is proxied behind the .aspx viewer (Logout.aspx present => session-gated), not directly reachable. Would need the viewer's authenticated proxy or Selenium.
states.notes: HAZARD: the two 'obvious' SIPCOT domains are dead/parked - sipcot.com is NXDOMAIN (SERVFAIL), sipcot.in serves a domain-parking 'lander' page (window.LANDER_SYSTEM=PW, ap:'parking'). Only the tn.gov.in domains are genuine. A GeoServer exists but is not exposed as an open WFS.

states.bulk_method: None available. The named corporation domain mpidc.co.in is down (Cloudflare 522 / connection failure on both www and apex). The live alternative invest.mp.gov.in is a React SPA (MP single-window/AKVN) whose land-bank data sits behind the app and is not exposed as an open endpoint; would need Selenium plus likely investor login.
states.notes: Primary MPIDC portal unreachable this session. No public machine-readable parcel source found; treat MP as gated/dead until mpidc.co.in returns.

states.bulk_method: None public. WBIDC's data/allotment runs through the WB Shilpa Sathi single-window (silpasathi.wb.gov.in), which is investor-login-driven; no open plot list, CSV, WFS or ArcGIS service found.
states.notes: HAZARD CONFIRMED: wbidc.com is a 496-byte parked placeholder ('Contact Support' only) - not the real corporation site (matches prior finding that wbidc.com was hijacked/parked). www.wbidclimited.com / wbidcltd.com / wbidc.co.in all NXDOMAIN. Genuine state entry point is silpasathi.wb.gov.in.

verdict: 7 of 12 expose parcel/plot data without login: Odisha (true ArcGIS REST FeatureService - the only structured geospatial API), UPSIDA, APIIC, TGIIC, RIICO and HSIIDC (server-rendered HTML tables), and MIDC (public but JSON-only via an AJAX controller / headless browser). GIDC, KIADB, West Bengal (Shilpa Sathi) and MP are login/single-window gated with no open feed; HSIIDC's parcel-level availability is a stale 2022 PDF while its rate table is HTML. Three named domains are dead or hijacked and must not be trusted: SIPCOT's sipcot.com (NXDOMAIN) and sipcot.in (parked lander), and WBIDC's wbidc.com (parked placeholder); MPIDC's mpidc.co.in is down.
best_targets: Odisha IDCO - ArcGIS REST (gis.investodisha.gov.in/arcgis/rest/services/test/Landbank_Info) - only true API, geometry + plot/khata/tahasil/area/category, paginate the query endpoint
UPSIDA - eservices.onlineupsida.com/PropertyHub/Index.aspx - one GET yields all available plots with district/estate/plot-no/size/price
APIIC - kpi.apiic.in:8443 VacantPlots.jsp - plot-level vacancy via zone->park->plot drill-down (14 zones)
TGIIC - tgiic.telangana.gov.in/PMVacantPlots - zone/district vacant-plot HTML tables
RIICO - riico.rajasthan.gov.in/undevelopedland.aspx - undeveloped land bank HTML table
central_aggregator_note: indiaindustriallandbank.gov.in (IILB/IIS) is the central aggregator, built by BISAG-N on NCOG WMS (OpenLayers) with a documented REST API (userManual/IIS_API_Doc_V2.3.5.pdf) and exploreParks/parkProfileView endpoints. Because states upload into it, it is the single best route to a merged national parcel dataset - reconcile its park/plot layers against the richer state sources (Odisha ArcGIS, UPSIDA/APIIC/TGIIC tables) for freshness.
